privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic VS Code voice module from scratch in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\apps\vscode. Both vscode.talon and vscode.py are to be newly created, and must contain at least 10 commands and 3 Python actions respectively. Setup scripts, export scripts, and the Python verifier all explicitly enforce these file paths, their app context header restrictions for VS Code, and the minimum item thresholds.
